brands.name: R.S Equipments
brands.description: Leading manufacturer of temperature-controlled laboratory equipment, specializing in freezers, refrigerators, and sterilization equipment for research and clinical laboratories.

products.name: Low Freezer -20°C
products.shortDescription: Reliable -20°C freezer for safe laboratory storage of biological samples and reagents.
products.fullDescription: The Low Freezer -20°C is designed for safe storage of biological samples, reagents, and other temperature-sensitive materials. Features include precise temperature control, energy-efficient operation, and user-friendly digital display. The unit is constructed with high-quality materials ensuring durability and consistent performance for years.

products.name: Deep Freezer -40°C
products.shortDescription: Reliable -40°C deep freezer for long-term storage of biological specimens.
products.fullDescription: The Deep Freezer -40°C offers dependable performance for preserving biological specimens, reagents, and other sensitive materials. With advanced cooling technology and precise temperature control, this unit ensures sample integrity for extended periods. The robust construction and energy-efficient design make it ideal for research and clinical laboratories.

products.name: Ultra Low Freezer -86°C
products.shortDescription: High-performance -86°C ultra-low temperature freezer for cryogenic storage.
products.fullDescription: The Ultra Low Freezer -86°C provides reliable cryogenic storage for valuable biological samples, vaccines, and research materials. Featuring advanced cascade refrigeration system, this unit maintains stable temperatures even in demanding environments. The intelligent control system with data logging capability ensures sample safety and regulatory compliance.

products.name: Laboratory Refrigerator +4°C
products.shortDescription: Precise +4°C laboratory refrigerator for safe vaccine and reagent storage.
products.fullDescription: The Laboratory Refrigerator +4°C is designed for safe storage of vaccines, reagents, biological samples, and other temperature-sensitive materials. The unit features precise temperature control, uniform cooling throughout the cabinet, and user-friendly digital display. The robust construction and energy-efficient design ensure reliable performance for years.

products.name: Walk-in Cold Room
products.shortDescription: Large-scale walk-in cold room for bulk storage of temperature-sensitive materials.
products.fullDescription: The Walk-in Cold Room provides spacious cold storage solutions for pharmaceutical, research, and industrial facilities. Designed for bulk storage of vaccines, biological samples, and other temperature-sensitive materials, this unit features robust construction, precise temperature control, and efficient insulation. Customizable configurations available to meet specific requirements.

products.fullDescription: The Walk-in Freezer Room provides spacious frozen storage solutions for pharmaceutical, research, and industrial facilities. Designed for bulk storage of frozen biological samples, reagents, and other temperature-sensitive materials, this unit features robust construction, precise temperature control, and efficient insulation. Customizable configurations available.

products.name: Re-circulating Chiller

products.fullDescription: The Re-circulating Chiller provides precise temperature control for laboratory equipment and processes. The compact design and quiet operation make it suitable for various laboratory settings.

specifications.Features: Auto-refill, Over-temperature protection

products.fullDescription: The iTherm D150-1 is a compact dry bath incubator designed for accurate and uniform heating of laboratory samples. It features precise temperature control, rapid heating, and interchangeable heating blocks, making it suitable for molecular biology, clinical, and research laboratories.

specifications.Applications: Sample incubation, enzyme reactions, DNA/RNA preparation
specifications.Features: Compact design, Fast heating, Interchangeable blocks, Over-temperature protection

products.name: iTherm D150-4
products.shortDescription: Multi-block digital dry bath with heated lid for consistent sample incubation.
products.fullDescription: The iTherm D150-4 is a high-performance dry bath incubator equipped with multiple block capacity and a heated lid to minimize sample evaporation. It delivers precise temperature control and uniform heating, making it ideal for PCR preparation, enzyme reactions, and other demanding laboratory workflows.

specifications.Applications: PCR preparation, Sample incubation, Molecular biology, Clinical laboratories
specifications.Features: Heated lid, Fast heating, Uniform temperature distribution, Over-temperature protection

products.name: iTherm CH25 NXT
products.shortDescription: Compact digital laboratory incubator for precise temperature-controlled sample incubation.
products.fullDescription: The iTherm CH25 NXT is a compact laboratory incubator designed to provide accurate and uniform temperature control for biological, clinical, and research applications. Featuring a digital interface, precise temperature regulation, and efficient chamber heating, it is ideal for sample incubation, microbiology, and molecular biology workflows.

specifications.Applications: Sample incubation, Cell culture, Microbiology, Molecular biology
specifications.Features: Uniform heating, Compact design, Digital temperature control, Over-temperature protection

products.name: iTherm WB
products.shortDescription: Digital laboratory water bath for accurate and uniform sample heating.
products.fullDescription: The iTherm WB is a precision laboratory water bath designed to provide stable and uniform temperature control for sample incubation, reagent warming, and various laboratory heating applications. Its digital control system, durable stainless-steel chamber, and efficient heating technology ensure reliable performance in research, clinical, pharmaceutical, and industrial laboratories.

specifications.Applications: Sample incubation, Reagent warming, Cell culture, Molecular biology
specifications.Features: Uniform temperature distribution, Digital temperature control, Fast heating, Over-temperature protection

products.name: iRupt 24P
products.shortDescription: High-performance bead homogenizer for rapid and efficient sample preparation.
products.fullDescription: The iRupt 24P is a powerful bead homogenizer designed for fast and reproducible disruption of biological samples. It enables efficient lysis and homogenization of tissues, cells, microorganisms, and other challenging samples, making it ideal for molecular biology, genomics, proteomics, and clinical research laboratories.

specifications.Applications: DNA/RNA extraction, Tissue homogenization, Cell lysis, Protein extraction
specifications.Features: Programmable operation, Adjustable speed and time, Uniform sample processing, Low-noise operation

products.name: iRupt Jr
products.shortDescription: Compact bead homogenizer for efficient disruption of biological samples.
products.fullDescription: The iRupt Jr is a compact laboratory bead homogenizer engineered for rapid and consistent sample disruption. Its space-saving design, precise control, and reliable performance make it ideal for DNA/RNA extraction, tissue homogenization, microbial lysis, and routine molecular biology applications.

specifications.Applications: Cell lysis, Tissue disruption, DNA/RNA extraction, Clinical and research laboratories
specifications.Features: Compact design, Adjustable speed and time, Consistent sample processing, Easy operation

products.fullDescription: The Maxi-Lyodel is a large capacity freeze dryer designed for high-volume lyophilization, suitable for industrial and research applications requiring bulk processing.

products.name: Accessories
products.shortDescription: A range of accessories for freeze dryers and laboratory equipment.
products.fullDescription: A comprehensive range of accessories designed to enhance the functionality and versatility of freeze dryers and other laboratory equipment.

specifications.Features: Versatile, Enhances functionality
